item.name: Horse Chestnut Hand Gear Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing a piece of attire. Until you pluck up the courage to open it, however, its contents will forever remain a mystery.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Hand gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
